headline: Wells Fargo Sees Improving Demand Trends for Illinois Tool Works (ITW)
summary: Illinois Tool Works Inc. (NYSE:ITW) is included among the 11 Best Rising Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. On May 4, Wells Fargo analyst Joseph O’Dea raised the firm’s price recommendation on Illinois Tool Works Inc. (NYSE:ITW) to $255 from $245. It reiterated an Underweight rating on the shares. The firm said sentiment around short-cycle […]
